empty.title: No optimization runs yet
empty.description: Create your first optimization run to get started.
empty.pageDescription: Try different prompt versions and see what performs best. Optimization runs help you improve accuracy, consistency, and user experience.

emptyState.runDemoExampleDesc: Start with a pre-configured optimization example for a support chatbot.
emptyState.startOptimizationRunDesc: Create a custom optimization workflow to test and improve your prompts.
emptyState.optimizeViaSdkDesc: Generate starter code for running a custom optimization programmatically.

deleteSingle.title: Delete optimization
deleteSingle.description: Deleting an optimization run will remove all its trials and their data. Related traces won't be affected. This action can't be undone. Are you sure you want to continue?

deleteBatch.title: Delete optimizations
deleteBatch.description: Deleting these optimization runs will remove all their trials and associated data. Related traces won't be affected. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to continue?

newPage.title: Optimize a prompt
newPage.name: Name
newPage.namePlaceholder: Enter optimization name, or the name will be generated automatically

addDialog.title: Start optimization run
addDialog.description: Select a test suite, choose the optimizer you would like to use, and we will improve your prompt for you
addDialog.fewShotBayesianDesc: Optimizes prompts using few-shot learning and Bayesian optimization.
addDialog.gepaDesc: Applies Genetic-Pareto search with reflection guidance.

algorithmConfigs.title: Algorithm settings
algorithmConfigs.description: Configure parameters for the selected optimization algorithm
algorithmConfigs.algorithmModelDescription: The model the optimizer uses for its own reasoning. Defaults to the prompt model.
algorithmConfigs.seedTooltip: Random seed for reproducibility. Use the same seed to get consistent results across runs.
algorithmConfigs.convergenceThresholdTooltip: Threshold for determining when optimization has converged. Lower values require more precision (0-1)
algorithmConfigs.populationSizeTooltip: Number of candidate solutions in each generation
algorithmConfigs.numberOfGenerationsTooltip: How many iterations of evolution to run
algorithmConfigs.mutationRateTooltip: Probability of random changes to candidate solutions (0-1)
algorithmConfigs.tournamentSizeTooltip: Number of candidates competing in each selection round
algorithmConfigs.elitismSizeTooltip: Number of best solutions preserved unchanged in each generation

temperatureConfig.label: Temperature
temperatureConfig.reasoningTooltip: Reasoning models require temperature = 1.0. This setting controls randomness in completions.
temperatureConfig.defaultTooltip: Controls randomness: Lowering results in less random completions. As the temperature approaches zero, the model will become deterministic and repetitive.

modelSelect.askAdmin: Ask a workspace admin to add one to choose a model.

metricConfigs.title: Metric settings
metricConfigs.description: Configure parameters for the selected evaluation metric
metricConfigs.pythonCodeDescription: Define a class that extends BaseMetric with a score method that takes output (the LLM response) and **kwargs (dataset fields), returning a ScoreResult.
metricConfigs.taskIntroductionPlaceholder: Describe the task context and what you're evaluating...
metricConfigs.evaluationCriteriaPlaceholder: Define evaluation criteria: accuracy, completeness, relevance...

studioTemplates.title: Run an optimization
studioTemplates.optimizeYourOwnPromptDescription: Start from scratch and configure your own optimization settings.
